source_note: Synthetic worked example. Anchors: brief §10.1 M.G. verbatim opener + §11 GC-01 row + §12.1 Maria archetype. Anonymised. No PII.

lines.speaker: M.G.
lines.text: I noticed on Companies House you've opened a second location in the last 6 months — who's approving expense reports across both stores now?

lines.speaker: Maria
lines.text: Well, my bookkeeper does, but honestly she's drowning. Receipts pile up.

lines.speaker: M.G.
lines.text: So you've got someone in seat but the workflow is breaking.

source_note: Contrast case · brief §10.4 P.B. verbatim opener + §11 GC-19 row. Used as the trigger-scenario failure pattern and as completion-problem distractor A.

lines.speaker: P.B.
lines.text: Hi, this is P. calling from FinTechCard. Do you have a moment to talk about your corporate spending?
